title: MySQL Connection Pool Exhaustion on Order Service
description: Order service unable to acquire database connections. All 500 connections consumed.
root_cause: Slow query (full table scan on orders table, 2.8M rows) holding connections for 12+ seconds. Missing index on (status, created_at) columns.
solution:
1. Killed long-running queries
2. Added index: CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status_created ON orders(status, created_at)
3. Increased max_connections to 800 temporarily
4. Implemented query timeout at application level (5s)
5. Added slow query alert threshold

events.content: Missing index causing full table scan on orders
All fixes applied, monitoring stable for 15min
